Text: Transports items horizontally between two buildings.
Transports items horizontally between two buildings and filters which goods are accepted.
Merges items from multiple input conveyor belts into one output conveyor belt.
Lifts items to the building above.
Lowers items to the building below.
Folktail engineers say it was inspired by watching logs roll downhill.
The belt knows what it wants. The rejected goods take it personally.
Three belts enter. One belt leaves.
For an Iron Teeth invention, it's surprisingly uplifting.
